concerns.text: FR-003 mandates partitioning the dataset into training and test sets stratified by alloy system. While T020 implements 'stratified 5-fold cross-validation', there is no explicit task to implement the initial train/test split (e.g., 80/20) required by FR-003 and US-2 Acceptance Scenario 1. The tasks focus entirely on CV logic, leaving the primary hold-out split undefined.

FR-005 requires a 'paired t-test' to compare model performance. Task T025 implements the 'Nadeau & Bengio corrected t-test'. While scientifically superior, the tasks lack a specific step to implement the standard paired t-test or explicitly document the deviation in the task description to satisfy the strict traceability of FR-005. The plan assumes the corrected test satisfies the requirement without a mapping task.

The US-1 Independent Test requires verifying '≥10 computed descriptors'. Tasks T012 and T009 only define the implementation and testing for three specific descriptors (δ, Δχ, ΔHmix). There are no tasks to implement or verify the remaining 7 descriptors required to meet the acceptance criteria of the user story.

FR-008 mandates applying Bonferroni correction for multiple hypothesis testing. Task T026 implements 'Bonferroni correction logic', but there is no task to explicitly apply this correction to the p-values generated in T025 or to report the corrected values in the final metrics (T027). The logic exists, but the application step is missing.

Task T001 references 'implementation plan' but the path provided is the project root 'projects/PROJ-451...'. It should reference the specific plan artifact 'plan.md' or the data-model artifact to ensure the task is actionable and traceable to the correct source document.
